languages.original_text: "Of course, Master Februs. One sigil for you, the other for your colleague Nuncius. I've been in post long enough not to be surprised by even the most eccentric guests on board."

languages.text: "Разумеется, господин Фебрус. Один сигил для вас, другой — для вашего коллеги Нунциуса. Я занимаю пост достаточно долго, чтобы не удивляться даже самым эксцентричным гостям на судне".
"Of course, Master Februs. One sigil for you, the other for your colleague Nuncius. I've been in post long enough not to be surprised by even the most eccentric guests on board."
languages.original_text: "Разумеется, господин Фебрус. Один сигил для вас, другой — для вашего коллеги Нунциуса. Я занимаю пост достаточно долго, чтобы не удивляться даже самым эксцентричным гостям на судне".

traits.locale_text: "Of course, Master Februs. One sigil for you, the other for your colleague Nuncius. I've been in post long enough not to be surprised by even the most eccentric guests on board."
"Of course, Master Februs. One sigil for you, the other for your colleague Nuncius. I've been in post long enough not to be surprised by even the most eccentric guests on board."
"Of course, Master Februs. One sigil for you, the other for your colleague Nuncius. I've been in post long enough not to be surprised by even the most eccentric guests on board."

languages.text: «Claro, maestro Februs. Un sigilo para usted y otro para su colega Nuncius. Llevo suficiente tiempo en el puesto como para no sorprenderme por los invitados más excéntricos que puedan subir a bordo».
languages.original_text: "Of course, Master Februs. One sigil for you, the other for your colleague Nuncius. I've been in post long enough not to be surprised by even the most eccentric guests on board."

traits.locale_text: «Claro, maestro Februs. Un sigilo para usted y otro para su colega Nuncius. Llevo suficiente tiempo en el puesto como para no sorprenderme por los invitados más excéntricos que puedan subir a bordo».

languages.text: 「もちろんでございます、フェブラス殿。一つはあなた様に、もう一つはご同僚のヌンキウス殿に。この職に就いて長うございますので、艦上のどれほど風変わりな賓客にも、もはや驚かされることはございません」
languages.original_text: "Of course, Master Februs. One sigil for you, the other for your colleague Nuncius. I've been in post long enough not to be surprised by even the most eccentric guests on board."

traits.locale_text: 「もちろんでございます、フェブラス殿。一つはあなた様に、もう一つはご同僚のヌンキウス殿に。この職に就いて長うございますので、艦上のどれほど風変わりな賓客にも、もはや驚かされることはございません」

languages.text: “当然，费布鲁斯大人。一枚给你，另一枚给你的同事努恩修斯。我任职已久，就算是船上最古怪的客人也不会让我惊讶了。”
languages.original_text: "Of course, Master Februs. One sigil for you, the other for your colleague Nuncius. I've been in post long enough not to be surprised by even the most eccentric guests on board."

traits.locale_text: “当然，费布鲁斯大人。一枚给你，另一枚给你的同事努恩修斯。我任职已久，就算是船上最古怪的客人也不会让我惊讶了。”

languages.text: "Natürlich, Meister Februs. Ein Siegel für Euch, das andere für Euren Kollegen Nuncius. Ich bin lange genug Truchsess dieses Schiffs, um mich über nichts mehr zu wundern."
languages.original_text: "Of course, Master Februs. One sigil for you, the other for your colleague Nuncius. I've been in post long enough not to be surprised by even the most eccentric guests on board."

traits.locale_text: "Natürlich, Meister Februs. Ein Siegel für Euch, das andere für Euren Kollegen Nuncius. Ich bin lange genug Truchsess dieses Schiffs, um mich über nichts mehr zu wundern."

languages.text: « Bien entendu, maître Februs. Un sceau pour vous, un autre pour votre collègue Nuncius. Cela fait suffisamment longtemps que je suis en poste pour accueillir sans surprise les demandes les plus excentriques de la part des passagers. »
languages.original_text: "Of course, Master Februs. One sigil for you, the other for your colleague Nuncius. I've been in post long enough not to be surprised by even the most eccentric guests on board."

traits.locale_text: « Bien entendu, maître Februs. Un sceau pour vous, un autre pour votre collègue Nuncius. Cela fait suffisamment longtemps que je suis en poste pour accueillir sans surprise les demandes les plus excentriques de la part des passagers. »

languages.text: "Elbette Üstat Februs. Bir mühür sizin, diğeri de meslektaşınız Nuncius'un. Gemideki en eksantrik konuklara bile şaşırmayacak kadar uzun süredir bu görevdeyim."
languages.original_text: "Of course, Master Februs. One sigil for you, the other for your colleague Nuncius. I've been in post long enough not to be surprised by even the most eccentric guests on board."

traits.locale_text: "Elbette Üstat Februs. Bir mühür sizin, diğeri de meslektaşınız Nuncius'un. Gemideki en eksantrik konuklara bile şaşırmayacak kadar uzun süredir bu görevdeyim."
